control_schema.description: Reviewed ground-control observations. Coordinate values must come from surveyed or authoritative evidence; this profile intentionally contains no example coordinates.

fields.point_id: Stable, unique string identifier for the physical control point.
fields.cad_x: Finite source drawing X coordinate in EPSG:3857 metres.
fields.cad_y: Finite source drawing Y coordinate in EPSG:3857 metres.
fields.target_easting: Finite surveyed target easting in EPSG:9481 metres.
fields.target_northing: Finite surveyed target northing in EPSG:9481 metres.
fields.target_crs: Must equal EPSG:9481 for this profile.
fields.role: Either train for model fitting or check for independent validation.
fields.source: Human-readable provenance for the survey or authoritative control record.
fields.accuracy_m: Positive estimated one-sigma positional accuracy in metres from the source record.
fields.weight: Positive reviewed fitting weight; it must not be inferred by an LLM.
fields.enabled: Boolean review switch for this control observation.

nonlinear_models.reason: TPS and rubber-sheet transforms are outside the current production contract and require a separate reviewed profile with dense, well-distributed controls and independent validation.
